allow: Bash(rm -rf node_modules apps/*/node_modules packages/*/node_modules pnpm-lock.yaml 2>&1; echo "---"; pnpm install 2>&1 | tail -10)
Bash(rm -rf node_modules apps/*/node_modules packages/*/node_modules pnpm-lock.yaml 2>&1; pnpm install 2>&1 | tail -5; echo "---TYPES---"; ls node_modules/.pnpm | grep "@types+react@" 2>&1)
Bash(rm -rf node_modules apps/*/node_modules packages/*/node_modules pnpm-lock.yaml 2>&1; pnpm install 2>&1 | tail -5; echo "---STORE---"; ls node_modules/.pnpm | grep "@types+react@" 2>&1)
